markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between GrowthX.ai and Mutiny for content marketing and SEO optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/YH-dsVvAykn2wxBvjTTVj_-ongDpZxqf?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Mutiny seeks to become the definitive source for ABM-specific content, facing challenges with declining website traffic due to increased LLM usage](https://fathom.video/share/YH-dsVvAykn2wxBvjTTVj_-ongDpZxqf?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai offers end-to-end content strategy and execution, including daily publishing and CMS management](https://fathom.video/share/YH-dsVvAykn2wxBvjTTVj_-ongDpZxqf?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Mutiny's narrow target audience (ABM practitioners) presents unique challenges for content scaling and diversity](https://fathom.video/share/YH-dsVvAykn2wxBvjTTVj_-ongDpZxqf?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)

## Topics

### Mutiny's Current Content Strategy

  - [Invested in SEO and blog content in the last 2-3 months](https://fathom.video/share/YH-dsVvAykn2wxBvjTTVj_-ongDpZxqf?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Partnering with Impact Partners for Reddit exposure and Omniscient for SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/YH-dsVvAykn2wxBvjTTVj_-ongDpZxqf?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [Publishing 4-6 blogs per week with internal freelance writers](https://fathom.video/share/YH-dsVvAykn2wxBvjTTVj_-ongDpZxqf?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Facing limitations in search term diversity for their niche ABM audience](https://fathom.video/share/YH-dsVvAykn2wxBvjTTVj_-ongDpZxqf?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)

### GrowthX.ai's Approach

  - [Two-phase process: Strategy sprint followed by execution](https://fathom.video/share/YH-dsVvAykn2wxBvjTTVj_-ongDpZxqf?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [AI workflows combined with expert oversight for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/YH-dsVvAykn2wxBvjTTVj_-ongDpZxqf?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [Capability to handle end-to-end strategy, daily publishing, and CMS management](https://fathom.video/share/YH-dsVvAykn2wxBvjTTVj_-ongDpZxqf?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Focus on creating credible, comprehensive, and current content](https://fathom.video/share/YH-dsVvAykn2wxBvjTTVj_-ongDpZxqf?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)

### Content Scaling and Quality

  - [GrowthX.ai emphasizes scaling quality content to improve AI search visibility](https://fathom.video/share/YH-dsVvAykn2wxBvjTTVj_-ongDpZxqf?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [Mutiny's concern: limited pool of relevant search terms in the ABM space](https://fathom.video/share/YH-dsVvAykn2wxBvjTTVj_-ongDpZxqf?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai suggests exploring broader content types (guides, programmatic SEO) to maximize value](https://fathom.video/share/YH-dsVvAykn2wxBvjTTVj_-ongDpZxqf?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)

### Case Studies and Examples

  - [Town: Blog built for accuracy in accounting/tax advice](https://fathom.video/share/YH-dsVvAykn2wxBvjTTVj_-ongDpZxqf?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
  - [Augment Code: 100+ guides created, significant traffic increase](https://fathom.video/share/YH-dsVvAykn2wxBvjTTVj_-ongDpZxqf?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
  - [Ramp: Programmatic vendor database and tool comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/YH-dsVvAykn2wxBvjTTVj_-ongDpZxqf?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [GrowthX.ai is CMS agnostic, comfortable with headless CMS like Contentful](https://fathom.video/share/YH-dsVvAykn2wxBvjTTVj_-ongDpZxqf?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [Offers creation of cover images and other visual elements](https://fathom.video/share/YH-dsVvAykn2wxBvjTTVj_-ongDpZxqf?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule a follow-up meeting with Marcel (GrowthX.ai CEO) to discuss specific opportunities for Mutiny](https://fathom.video/share/YH-dsVvAykn2wxBvjTTVj_-ongDpZxqf?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai to send overview resources and content examples to Mutiny team](https://fathom.video/share/YH-dsVvAykn2wxBvjTTVj_-ongDpZxqf?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
  - [Mutiny to include additional team members (growth manager, social posting lead) in the next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/YH-dsVvAykn2wxBvjTTVj_-ongDpZxqf?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
